hero.heading: About
hero.sub: Age management and corrective skin care in the heart of Eugene.

clinic.heading: A different kind of
clinic.body:
Polished Skin is a Eugene skincare clinic built on one idea: skincare should be unhurried, genuinely personal, and actually effective. We specialize in **age management and corrective skin care** — from relaxing signature facials to advanced, results-driven treatments.

Every appointment starts with your skin. We take the time to understand your concerns, your history, and your goals, so we can find the right treatment and build a plan made just for you. No rushing, no upsells, no judgment — just expert care in a calm, welcoming space.

Our philosophy is simple: **rebuild your skin, don't break it down.** The treatments we choose work with your skin's own biology to strengthen and renew it — never strip or overwork it.

The result is healthier, more confident skin you can see, and an experience you'll actually look forward to coming back to.

cards.title: A real consultation
cards.text: We start by understanding your skin and goals — so your treatment is built for you, not a template.

cards.title: A calm experience
cards.text: A clean, welcoming clinic where you can fully relax. No rush, no pressure — just expert care.

cards.title: Results you'll see
cards.text: Honest advice and effective treatments that leave your skin healthier every single visit.

esthetician.heading: Behind the clinic
esthetician.bio: Polished Skin is led by **Analisa**, a licensed, ProCell-certified esthetician who pairs advanced, results-driven treatments with a genuine understanding of how skin works. Her goal for every client is simple: leave glowing, confident, and excited to come back.

cta.heading: Let's get you
cta.sub: Book your first appointment — we can't wait to meet you.
